programmes.show_description: Hard-hitting Australian drama series. Ferguson puts her life on the line in an attempt to win over Kaz. Maxine is worried about a lump in her breast.
Australian drama series. Ferguson strengthens her alliance with Kaz by blaming Will for her rape and Bea as his lover. Maxine receives a devastating diagnosis.
Drama series. Ferguson tries to strengthen her hold over Kaz by manipulating Maxine into an act of extreme violence. Bea and Allie's bond deepens. A new guard arrives.
Graphic drama series. When Tasha is subjected to 'prison justice' for pushing the panic button, Doreen turns her back on Bea and joins Kaz's crew.

programmes.show_name: Columbo: Last Salute to the Commodore
programmes.show_description: Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn. When a tycoon is found dead, Columbo thinks he has a straightforward case on his hands. (1976)

programmes.show_name: Columbo: Ransom for a Dead Man
programmes.show_description: Crime drama starring Peter Falk and Lee Grant. A lawyer comes up with a clever plan to murder her husband. (1971)
Feature-length detective drama starring Peter Falk and Hector Elizondo. A visiting dignitary plans to murder his royal charge and blame dissident supporters of the young prince. (1975)
Crime drama starring Peter Falk and Janis Paige. Lt Columbo is persuaded to dig up a concrete pylon by a woman who suspects that her husband was murdered. (1972)
Excruciating and hilarious TV moments, including Richard Madeley's infamous impression of Ali G, Tom Cruise's sofa bombing, and an IT worker's legendary 'accidental' news interview.
After Dr. Janet Napier is acquitted of murder, members of her family are killed in revenge. Taggart goes undercover to find out the truth.
James May uncovers the truth behind Sir Walter Raleigh's legendary rise - from his persuasive skills to his New World ventures - and reveals the dark legacy of his explorations. (Ep2/3)

programmes.show_name: Stonehenge: The Discovery with Dan Snow
programmes.show_description: Dan pieces together the story of Stonehenge, revealing the latest discoveries that are solving its many mysteries, including how 20-tonne stones were moved.
Documentary series. Rob Bell tells the story behind the design and construction of Brunel's Clifton suspension bridge over the Avon gorge at Bristol. (Ep 1)

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Documentary series. Ben travels to Australia's north west cape to meet two people, compelled by tragedy, to turn their backs on their former lifestyles.

Learn more about the story behind the rusting carcass of ship, mysteriously still upright decades after its desertion, and a network of concrete channels hidden in a mountaintop forest.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Documentary series. Ben meets a couple who have made their home on a floating island they have built themselves which sits in the aptly named Freedom Cove.
Susan follows Ross Poldark's trail in Cornwall: dancing in Helston, scything near Liskeard, sailing in Falmouth, exploring tin mining and the county's wartime history - plus bagpipes!
Tom follows in the steps of 17th, 18th and 19th-century aristocrats on their Grand Tours of Europe. Starting in Paris, he takes in sights including Notre-Dame.
Jane McDonald is off on her travels again, but this time, she's taking short weekend breaks to Europe, UK and USA.
